text.title: AI-Feature Trust Metrics for Market Research Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the feature live with WAU >= 100 and instrumentation pipeline?

conclusion.verdict: Too few users — use 1-1 trust interviews instead.
Wire analytics first; methodology cannot operate without events.

branch.when: wau >= 100 AND instrumentation_ready == true AND baseline_captured == false
wau >= 100 AND instrumentation_ready == true AND baseline_captured == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full scorecard with signals + fairness cuts.
